title: Verify project-scoped publish auth bypasses 2FA on the next real release
description: On the next real to-execution publish, confirm the RELEASE.md recipe publishes unattended (no OTP prompt / no E403). npm-personal-token may be a classic token that 2FA-gates writes; whoami can't prove write-2FA. If it OTP/E403s, overwrite the Keychain item (service npm-personal-token, account $USER) value with an automation/granular-automation token that bypasses 2FA — src/.npmrc and the recipe stay unchanged.
notes: Filed 2026-06-09 as the deferred 2FA-bypass-on-write proof for EXEC-034 (Brooks).
